## Summary

Describe the change and why it is useful.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests/checks described in `README.md`.
- [ ] I considered gate, electrical, authentication, persistence, and OTA safety implications where applicable.

## Contribution terms

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and agree to its lightweight contribution agreement.
- [ ] I created this contribution or have the legal right and authority to submit it.
- [ ] I identified any included third-party material and preserved its required notices.
